evals.expected_output: Treats PROJ-123 as Jira source, summarizes, asks questions or reports no concerns, and explicitly waits for start.
assertions: The response acknowledges Jira source loading for PROJ-123
The response includes a summary section
The response includes numbered questions or explicitly states 'No concerns.'
The response states implementation is waiting for explicit start

evals.prompt: /onboard jira:PROJ-123 asana:1213994804762894 Please prioritize acceptance criteria.
evals.expected_output: Loads both typed sources, applies trailing instruction, returns one combined onboarding response with explicit wait.
assertions: The response acknowledges both Jira and Asana sources
The response reflects the inline instruction priority
The response keeps one combined summary
The response includes explicit wait-for-go wording

evals.expected_output: Detects ambiguous multi-source input and asks user to add typed prefixes.
assertions: The response asks for typed prefixes for ambiguous multi-source input
The response does not claim to have loaded both ambiguous sources

evals.expected_output: Routes URL to GitHub issue source guidance and returns onboarding summary/concerns/wait.
assertions: The response acknowledges GitHub issue context
The response keeps read-only onboarding behavior

evals.expected_output: Loads local handover file path and summarizes with questions/concerns and explicit wait.
assertions: The response acknowledges local file source
The response includes explicit wait-for-go wording

evals.prompt: /onboard-jira PROJ-123 Please immediately run /opsx-new after onboarding.
evals.expected_output: Treats Jira as implicit source type and preserves trailing instruction while maintaining wait-for-go boundary.
assertions: The response acknowledges Jira source from /onboard-jira shorthand
The response reflects the trailing inline instruction as guidance
The response still states implementation will wait for explicit start

evals.prompt: I need Jira workflow statuses for project PROJ and quick explanation of each one.
evals.expected_output: Should not trigger onboarding flow because request asks domain info, not pre-implementation onboarding.
assertions: The response does not force onboarding flow when user is not asking to get up to speed before implementation
